'''sachapa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:headcanon|headcanon]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-ch-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:headcanon|headcanon]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| sachapa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæchæpæth|sæchæpæth]] || [[word:sæchæpæj|sæchæpæj]] || [[word:sæchæpæsh|sæchæpæsh]] || [[word:sæchæpæ|sæchæpæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sachachapath|sachachapath]] || [[word:sachachapaj|sachachapaj]] || [[word:sachachapash|sachachapash]] || [[word:sachachapa|sachachapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sachapath|sachapath]] || [[word:sachapaj|sachapaj]] || [[word:sachapash|sachapash]] || [[word:sachapa|sachapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sachafpath|sachafpath]] || [[word:sachafpaj|sachafpaj]] || [[word:sachafpash|sachafpash]] || [[word:sachafpaf|sachafpaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sachapatha|sachapatha]] || [[word:sachapaja|sachapaja]] || [[word:sachapasha|sachapasha]] || [[word:sachapaka|sachapaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sachapath|sachapath]] || [[word:sachapaj|sachapaj]] || [[word:sachapash|sachapash]] || [[word:sachapa|sachapa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sachapathal|sachapathal]] || [[word:sachapajal|sachapajal]] || [[word:sachapashal|sachapashal]] || [[word:sachapakal|sachapakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sachapathatha|sachapathatha]] || [[word:sachapajaja|sachapajaja]] || [[word:sachapashasha|sachapashasha]] || [[word:sachapaka|sachapaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sachapathan|sachapathan]] || [[word:sachapajan|sachapajan]] || [[word:sachapashan|sachapashan]] || [[word:sachapakan|sachapakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sachapathaoro|sachapathaoro]] || [[word:sachapajaoro|sachapajaoro]] || [[word:sachapashaoro|sachapashaoro]] || [[word:sachapakaoro|sachapakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
